modmenu.descriptionTranslation.barkahud: This mod adds a racing style HUD, configurable, for riding a boat, and is designed mostly for racing boats on ice.
barkahud.config.title: BarkaHud Options
barkahud.tooltip.extended: Enables acceleration meter and input display
barkahud.tooltip.bar_type: Change the display and behavior of the speed bar:
barkahud.tooltip.bar_type.packed: Water & Packed: Best for low speeds.
barkahud.tooltip.bar_type.mixed: Mixed: Best for running on any kind of ice.
barkahud.tooltip.bar_type.blue: Blue: Suitable mostly for blue ice racing.
barkahud.tooltip.bar_type.progressive: Progressive: Automatically adjusts to the speed.
barkahud.tooltip.camera_control: The player automatically looks in the direction the boat is going.
barkahud.tooltip.camera_aggressiveness: The speed at which the player starts completely ignoring the boat's orientation (in m/s, lower is more aggressive).
barkahud.tooltip.camera_smoothing: Controls how quickly the player's orientation adjusts to changes in velocity.
